Comment: Ad compliance pipeline (SPEC.md section 3.1). Steps 1-2 (TriggerIngest, IsDuplicate) are implemented. Steps 3-9 (IndexVideo onward) are not yet implemented.

TriggerIngest.Comment: Step 1: receive S3 event or reprocess request, presign an S3 reference, look up the filename in ads

IsDuplicate.Comment: Step 2: skip if the filename already exists in ads and this is not a reprocess run

LogDuplicateSkip.Comment: Step 2 (Yes branch): log the skipped duplicate and end

PipelineNotYetImplemented.Comment: Placeholder for SPEC.md 3.1 steps 3-9 (IndexVideo, WaitForIndexing, RunComplianceAnalysis, ParseAndPersist, ApplySuggestionLogic, PersistFinal, error handling). Replace with the real states in a follow-up change.

IngestError.Cause: TriggerIngest failed before an ads row was created; see the TriggerIngest CloudWatch Logs for details.
